name: Synco Xtalk XPro1 Wireless Intercom Master/Remote Headset
description: The Synco Xtalk XPro1 is a single wireless intercom headset that can be set as either the master or remote headset without requiring a bodypack or hub.

features.Key Features: 1 Single-Ear Headset, No Hub Needed | Full-Duplex, Use Any Headset as Master | True Wireless Headset, No Bodypack | AI Audio Echo Cancellation (AEC) 2.0 | Expandable to 13 Headsets | 1640' Transmission Distance | 24-Hour Battery Life, 3.5mm Monitor Jack | Compatible with XTalk X & XMax | Rechargeable Battery, Charging Cable
features.What's in the box?: Synco Xtalk XPro1 Wireless Intercom Master/Remote Headset (2.4 GHz) | Charging Cable | Rechargeable Battery | One-Ear Foam Cushion | Mic Windshield | Carrying Bag | Limited 1-Year Manufacturer Warranty
